allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Write-Output "Port $\($c.LocalPort\) -> PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)"; try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } catch { Write-Output "could not kill $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } })
Bash(git commit -m 'Add vercel.json to point build at archform/ subdirectory *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Move vercel.json into archform/ subdir; remove from root *)
